---
title: "Lecture Notes"
---

- [Lecture 01: Introduction](Introduction.qmd){target="_blank"}
- [Lecture 02: Matrix Operations](Lecture02_MatrixOperations.qmd){target="_blank"}
- [Lecture 03: Random Vectors/Matrices](Lecture03_RandomV.qmd){target="_blank"}
- [Lecture 04: A Random Sample from a Multivariate Normal](Lecture04_ARandomSampleFromMultivariate.qmd){target="_blank"}
- [Lecture 05: Multivariate Normal Distribution](Lecture05_NormalAndMVN.pdf){target="_blank"}
- [Lecture 06: The Sample Covariance Matrix and Wishart Distribution](Lecture06_Wishart.qmd){target="_blank"}
- [Lecture 07: Inference of Mean Vectors: Hotelling's T^2](Lecture07_Hotelling.qmd){target="_blank"}
- [Lecture 08: Multivariate Analysis of Variance](Lecture08_MANOVA.qmd){target="_blank"}
